case_title: RONALD R. WREN ADVERTISING, INC. VS ANDREACCHI, MIKE DBA JUNK KING et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONALD R. WREN ADVERTISING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREACCHI, MIKE DBA JUNK KING REARDON, BRIAN DBA JUNK KING $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,955.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDREACCHI, MIKE DBA JUNK KING REARDON, BRIAN DBA JUNK KING HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-29-2007, GRANTED
DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, TO BE REFILED IN PROPER VENUE.
ANSWER TO DEFT'S VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY PLFT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY RONALD R. WREN ADVERTISING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREACCHI, MIKE DBA JUNK KING REARDON, BRIAN DBA JUNK KING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREACCHI, MIKE DBA JUNK KING
